hero.subtitle: A token-first design system for teams that ship fast without shipping debt.

panels.title: Foundations
panels.body: OKLCH color tokens with phosphor green terminal palette on void backgrounds. IBM Plex Sans for UI, IBM Plex Mono for system chrome. Motion via GSAP timelines with reduced-motion fallbacks.

panels.title: Deliverables
panels.body: MASTER.md token reference, page-level overrides in design-system/pages/, and contrast-checked phosphor-on-void pairs at ≥4.5:1. Components built on shadcn/ui primitives — composed, not copied.

panels.title: Principles
panels.body: One source of truth in tokens. Diegetic UI over decorative noise. Accessibility is not a phase — it is a constraint baked into every component variant.

panels.title: Used In
panels.body: ROOT OS portfolio shell, terminal chrome, window frames, Mail.app form patterns, and the phosphor HUD system you are navigating right now.
